# KMA PolyClinic

> KMA PolyClinic is a multi-specialty medical polyclinic in Fulya, Istanbul, offering aesthetics, dermatology, dentistry, plastic surgery, hair and eyebrow transplant, and (for Persian patients) check-up & laboratory services.

## NAP

- Name: KMA PolyClinic
- Address: Fulya Mah. Büyükdere Cad. Torun Center A Blok No:74A — İç Kapı No:10, Istanbul, TR
- Phone: +90 212 680 79 00
- Email: info@kmapoliklinik.com.tr
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 11:00–19:00
- Website: https://kmapoliklinik.com.tr
- Languages: Turkish (tr), English (en), Persian (fa), Arabic (ar)

## Departments

- Aesthetics
- Dermatology
- Dentistry
- Plastic Surgery
- Hair Transplant
- Eyebrow Transplant
- Check-up & Laboratory (fa locale only)

## Priority Services

- Eyebrow Transplant
- Hair Transplant
- Botox
- Filler
- Laser

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kma_polyclinic/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/kmapolyclinicc
